2603.22529.title: Ego2Web: A Web Agent Benchmark Grounded in Egocentric Videos
2603.22529.paper_summary: Multimodal AI agents are increasingly automating complex real-world workflows that involve online web execution. However, current web-agent benchmarks suffer from a critical limitation: they focus entirely on web-based interaction and perception, lacking grounding in the user's real-world physical surroundings. This limitation prevents evaluation in crucial scenarios, such as when an agent must use egocentric visual perception (e.g., via AR glasses) to recognize an object in the user's surroundings and then complete a related task online. To address this gap, we introduce Ego2Web, the first benchmark designed to bridge egocentric video perception and web agent execution. Ego2Web pairs real-world first-person video recordings with web tasks that require visual understanding, web task planning, and interaction in an online environment for successful completion. We utilize an automatic data-generation pipeline combined with human verification and refinement to curate well-constructed, high-quality video-task pairs across diverse web task types, including e-commerce, media retrieval, knowledge lookup, etc. To facilitate accurate and scalable evaluation for our benchmark, we also develop a novel LLM-as-a-Judge automatic evaluation method, Ego2WebJudge, which achieves approximately 84% agreement with human judgment, substantially higher than existing evaluation methods. Experiments with diverse SoTA agents on our Ego2Web show that their performance is weak, with substantial headroom across all task categories. We also conduct a comprehensive ablation study on task design, highlighting the necessity of accurate video understanding in the proposed task and the limitations of current agents. We hope Ego2Web can be a critical new resource for developing truly capable AI assistants that can seamlessly see, understand, and act across the physical and digital worlds.
2603.22529.paper_summary_zh: 多模態 AI 代理正在日益自動化涉及在線網絡執行的複雜現實工作流程。<lb/>然而，當前的網絡代理基準存在一個關鍵限制：它們完全專注於基於網絡的互動和感知，缺乏對用戶現實物理環境的基礎認識。<lb/>這一限制阻礙了在關鍵場景中的評估，例如當代理必須使用自我中心的視覺感知（例如，通過 AR 眼鏡）來識別用戶周圍的物體，然後在線完成相關任務。<lb/>為了解決這一空白，我們推出了 Ego2Web，這是第一個旨在橋接自我中心視頻感知和網絡代理執行的基準。<lb/>Ego2Web 將現實世界的第一人稱視頻錄像與需要視覺理解、網絡任務規劃和在線環境互動的網絡任務配對，以便成功完成。<lb/>我們利用自動數據生成管道，結合人類驗證和精煉，策劃出結構良好、高質量的視頻任務對，涵蓋各種網絡任務類型，包括電子商務、媒體檢索、知識查詢等。<lb/>為了促進我們基準的準確和可擴展評估，我們還開發了一種新型 LLM-as-a-Judge 自動評估方法 Ego2WebJudge，該方法與人類判斷的協議約為 84%，顯著高於現有評估方法。<lb/>在我們的 Ego2Web 上對多樣的 SoTA 代理進行的實驗顯示，它們的表現較弱，在所有任務類別中都有顯著的提升空間。<lb/>我們還對任務設計進行了全面的消融研究，突顯了在所提議的任務中準確視頻理解的必要性以及當前代理的局限性。<lb/>我們希望 Ego2Web 能成為開發真正能夠在物理和數字世界中無縫看到、理解和行動的 AI 助手的重要新資源。
2603.22529.author: Shoubin Yu et.al.
2603.22529.authors: Shoubin Yu, Lei Shu, Antoine Yang, Yao Fu, Srinivas Sunkara, Maria Wang, Jindong Chen, Mohit Bansal, Boqing Gong
